metadata.description: Safety check rules for Hitachi EX-N01A logic analysis, extracted from Expert Trap Detection Guide.

deadlock_risk.name: Deadlock Detection (No Watchdog)
deadlock_risk.check_logic: IF transition condition includes DI signal AND NO Timer (TD/TU) associated with the same step THEN trigger warning.
deadlock_risk.remediation: Add a Watchdog Timer (TD) to the step and handle timeout transition.

priority_trap.name: Logic Priority Trap (Race Condition)
priority_trap.check_logic: IF multiple transition lines exist for the same source step AND normal path is listed BEFORE emergency/alarm path THEN trigger warning.
priority_trap.remediation: Move emergency/alarm transitions to the top of the list for the current step.

state_residue.name: State Residue Risk
state_residue.check_logic: IF Step 01 (Standby) pattern allows outputs to be '*' (Hold) instead of '0' (Forced Off) THEN trigger warning.
state_residue.remediation: Set Step 01 pattern to '0' for all critical valves and motors.

water_hammer_risk.name: Water Hammer Risk (No Overlap)
water_hammer_risk.check_logic: IF Step N closes Valve A AND Step N+1 opens Valve B AND there is NO overlap (A closes before B opens) THEN trigger warning.
water_hammer_risk.remediation: Design Overlap Mode: Open new valve before closing the old one.
